title: TaskStamped payload
description: Emitted when a task's commit_sha is set via task_stamp_sha. Distinct from TaskCompleted(commit_sha=...) because task_stamp_sha is a separate action used when the commit lands AFTER task_complete (e.g., the task closes on a note and the commit follows on a follow-up edit). Distinct from TaskEdited(updated_fields=["commit_sha"]) so readers can filter for SHA stamps without parsing field-name arrays — task_stamp_sha is its own MCP action and gets its own event type.

chain_slug.description: Chain slug disambiguating which chain's task this event targets, so the fold scopes to one task rather than fanning out across same-slug tasks in the project (bug task-lifecycle-event-folds-fan-out-across-duplicate-task-slugs). Optional: pre-fix events omit it and the fold falls back to the legacy slug+project match.

commit_sha.description: The commit that landed the task's deliverable, or the literal sentinel 'unversioned' for tasks whose artifacts live outside any git repo (user-level scripts, vault docs) per mcp__toolkit-server__work convention.
